headline: Constellation Energy Is Helping Solve the AI Power Crunch. Here's Why You Shouldn't Hesitate to Buy It Right Now.
summary: Constellation Energy's stock has pulled back from extreme valuation levels, making it far more attractive.

headline: Should Investors Be Concerned That Walmart Got Kicked Out of the $1 Trillion Club and Now the $900 Billion Club?
summary: The giant retailer's stock has tumbled by more than 15% from the 52-week high it touched in mid-May.
